name: Roof Rails
core_loop: Run forward, collect pole pieces to extend your balancing pole, use the pole to slide on rails between rooftops, and avoid obstacles that cut the pole.
audience_proxy: Broad casual audience, appealing to all ages and genders looking for quick, accessible entertainment.
visual_style: 3D minimalist with simple geometry, bright pastel colors, and a clean, uncluttered aesthetic.

palette.description: Bright cyan and blue cityscape with a stark white path and vibrant yellow and magenta accents.
